goal: Attention queue frontend — wire resolve/defer buttons to API endpoints

acceptance_criteria.description: migrationApi.ts extended with resolveAttentionItem(engagementId, itemId, source, note) and deferAttentionItem(engagementId, itemId, source, note) functions
AttentionQueue component resolve button calls resolveAttentionItem with correct source from item.source field. Optimistic update removes item from list, rolls back on error.
AttentionQueue component defer button calls deferAttentionItem. Optimistic update moves item to deferred state, rolls back on error.
Resolve/defer buttons only visible to users with editor or owner role
Resolution note input — small text field shown on resolve/defer click before confirming the action

critical: Resolve/defer buttons only visible to editor+ roles (check user role from auth context)
source field passed correctly from AttentionItem data — not hardcoded
high: Optimistic update with rollback on error
Loading state on buttons during API call
Error toast shown on failure with user-friendly message (no stack traces)
medium: Keyboard accessibility — resolve/defer triggerable via Enter key
